_meta.description: 30-second fashion/lifestyle ad driven entirely by music. Visual-only rhythm — no dialogue, no supers. Cuts land on phrase endings, not every beat. Slow, confident luxury pacing.

sections.name: Cold open
sections.notes: Single strong frame. No music intro cut — let it play under. Silence or room tone if music has an intro.

sections.name: Brand reveal
sections.notes: Brand name or campaign identity appears. Either a title card or a product hero shot. Crossfade from cold open.

sections.name: Editorial cuts
sections.notes: 4–5 editorial shots. Mix wide, medium, detail. Cuts every 3–4s on musical phrase ends. No talking, no text.

sections.name: Campaign line
sections.notes: Campaign tagline or season identifier appears over a still or slow clip.

sections.name: Logo sting
sections.notes: Brand logo on black or brand color. Music fades on last beat. Hold 1s after music ends.

clips.notes: Single strong image. Fashion close-up, texture, or atmospheric establishing shot. No motion preferred.
Hero product or brand identity shot. Clean background, deliberate lighting.
Wide establishing shot — location, set, or environment context.
Medium shot of model or subject. Movement should feel intentional.
Tight detail: fabric texture, clasp, label, or surface. Macro or very close.
Model in motion — walking, turning, gesture. Capture the movement mid-phrase.
Second product detail or atmospheric texture. Slightly longer — the editorial finale before the campaign line.
Clean visual to hold the campaign tagline. Low motion — the text is the hero here.
Brand logo on solid background. Can be a generated still — black #0A0A0A or brand color.

music.notes: Music is primary. Do not duck. Trim track to start on the downbeat closest to 0s.
